member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.App
member.summary: Interaction logic for App.xaml
App

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.App.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.App.Main
member.summary: Application Entry Point.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Core.Catalog
member.summary: Pre-defined text blocks and message strings.

remarks.para: Centralized to keep the code clean, maintainable, and to facilitate modification of messages.

The following types of blueprints are defined here:
lst_ - A list of something
msgbox_ - Message box string[] definitions
msgtxt_ - Text string definitions

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration
member.summary: Represents the application's configuration and provides helpers to load, validate, and persist configuration settings to disk.
member.remarks: Configuration values are stored in a JSON file at "AppData/Config/transmorger.config". The method performs interactive validation and may show message boxes or terminate the application if required settings are missing.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration mode name (for example, "Default" or "Admin").

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.StandardDirectories
member.summary: Gets or sets a mapping of standard directory keys to their configured paths.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.AdminDirectories
member.summary: Gets or sets administrator-only directory mappings used by advanced features.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.WriteConfigFile(TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration)
member.summary: Writes the provided instance to the application configuration file located at "AppData/Config/transmorger.config".
member.param: The configuration to write to disk.
member.remarks: The containing directory is expected to be "AppData/Config" under the application's current working directory.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.Load
member.summary: Loads the configuration from the application's configuration file. If the file does not exist, a default configuration is created and written to disk.
member.remarks: If the configuration file is absent this method creates the containing "AppData/Config" directory and writes a default configuration file.
member.returns: The loaded instance.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration.CreateDefault(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a default configuration instance using the provided application data directory as the base for directory paths.
member.returns: A new populated with default values.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework
member.summary: Provides framework-level validation for configuration directory settings.
member.remarks: The methods in this class validate configured directories and interact with the user via message boxes when values are missing or paths do not exist. In certain cases the user will be prompted to create missing directories or the application will be terminated via .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.Verify(TingenTransmorger.Core.Configuration)
member.summary: Verifies the configuration by validating standard directories and, when in admin mode, administrator-only directories.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.VerifyDirectories(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Validates a set of directory mappings. For each entry this method ensures that a non-empty path exists and that the target directory exists on disk.
member.param: A dictionary mapping configuration keys to directory paths.
member.remarks: This method will display message boxes for missing or invalid values and will prompt the user to create missing directories. Choosing not to create a required directory will terminate the application.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.PromptToCreateDirectory(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Prompts the user to create a directory when a configured path does not exist.
member.param: A key/value pair where the key is the configuration name and the value is the path.
member.remarks: If the user agrees the directory will be created. If the user declines the application will be terminated via .

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Core.Framework.NullEmptyWarning(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Shows an error message for a missing or empty configuration setting and terminates the application.
member.param: A key/value pair where the key is the configuration name and the value is the path.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow
member.summary: Provide the user with real-time feedback on the progress of the database rebuild process.
DatabaseRebuildWindow

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow._parentWindow
member.summary: Used to track the parent window.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Entry point for the DatabaseRebuildWindow.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.SetParentWindow(System.Windows.Window)
member.summary: Sets the parent window that should be shown when this window closes.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.UpdateTask(System.String)
member.summary: Inform the user what the current database rebuild task is.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.UpdateProgress(System.Double)
member.summary: Update the user where they are in the rebuild progress.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.UpdateStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Provide the user with a detailed database rebuild status message.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.Complete
member.summary: Marks the rebuild as complete and closes the window.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.CloseClick
member.summary: Closes the DatabaseRebuildWindow and shows the original parent window.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.DatabaseRebuildWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryType
member.summary: Message type for the MessageHistoryWindow

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryWindow
member.summary: Interaction logic for MessageHistoryWindow.xaml
MessageHistoryWindow

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryWindow.FormatStartTime(System.String)
member.summary: Formats the start time to MM/DD/YY HH:MM AM/PM format, or returns "---" if empty.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryWindow.FormatErrorDetails(System.String)
member.summary: Formats error details, showing "---" if empty or if content is "{}".

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.MessageHistoryRow
member.summary: Represents a row in the combined message history grid.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.SearchFor
member.summary: Database searches.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.SearchFor.SearchResult(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Patient/provider search.
member.param: Indicates whether to search by name (true) or ID (false).

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase
member.summary: Builds the Transmorger database from processed report JSON files.
Partial class for TransmorgerDatabase diagnostic methods.
Partial class for TransmorgerDatabase to add SMS tracking methods.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase._jsonRoot
member.summary: Represents the root JSON element of the parsed database structure.
member.remarks: This field provides access to the main JSON object from which all database data can be traversed. It is essential for operations that require reading or navigating the database contents.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase._hasData
member.summary: Represents whether the database has been successfully loaded with data.
member.remarks: This flag is used to indicate if the _jsonRoot contains valid data that can be accessed. If false, it suggests that the database is either not loaded or contains no data, and attempts to access _jsonRoot should be handled accordingly to avoid errors.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.Update(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check to see if the master database is newer than the local database and offer to upgrade.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a TransmorgerDatabase instance from the specified local database file path.
member.remarks: If the specified file does not exist, the application will stop and notify the user. Ensure that the file path is correct and accessible.
member.param: The path to the local database file.
member.returns: A TransmorgerDatabase instance populated with data from the specified file.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetSummaryVisitStatsJson
member.summary: Returns the VisitStats section from the loaded database as pretty JSON.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetSummaryMessageFailureJson
member.summary: Returns the MessageFailure section from the loaded database as pretty JSON.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetPatients
member.summary: Gets all patients from the database.
member.returns: List of patient records with PatientName and PatientId.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetProviders
member.summary: Gets all providers from the database.
member.returns: List of provider records with ProviderName and ProviderId.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetPatientDetails(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets detailed information for a specific patient.
member.returns: JsonElement containing the full patient record, or null if not found.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetProviderDetails(System.String)
member.summary: Gets detailed information for a specific provider.
member.returns: JsonElement containing the full provider record, or null if not found.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetMeetingDetail(System.String)
member.summary: Gets meeting detail information by MeetingId.
member.returns: JsonElement containing the meeting detail record, or null if not found.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.HasMeetingError(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a meeting has an error in the MeetingError collection.
member.param: The ID of the meeting to check.
member.returns: True if the meeting has an error, false otherwise.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetMeetingError(System.String)
member.summary: Gets meeting error information by MeetingId.
member.returns: JsonElement containing the meeting error record with Kind and Reason, or null if not found.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.Build(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the complete transmorger.json file from processed JSON reports.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.BuildSummaryComponent(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the Summary component containing Visit Stats and Message Failure summaries.
member.returns: Dictionary containing both summary sections.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.BuildPatientsComponent(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Builds the Patients component from Visit Details participant data.
member.returns: List of unique patient records.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.BuildProvidersComponent(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Builds the Providers component from Visit Details participant and meeting data.
member.returns: List of unique provider records.

member.summary: Builds the MeetingDetail component from Visit Details Meeting Details.
member.param: List of patient records for validation.
List of provider records for validation.
member.returns: Dictionary of meeting details indexed by MeetingId.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.BuildMeetingErrorComponent(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Builds the MeetingError component from Visit Stats Meeting Errors.
member.param: List of patient records for validation.
List of provider records for validation.
member.returns: Dictionary of meeting errors indexed by MeetingId.

member.summary: Adds provider names from Visit Details Participant Details.
member.param: Dictionary of providers keyed by name.

member.summary: Consolidates provider IDs and meeting IDs from Visit Details Meeting Details in a single pass.
member.param: Dictionary of providers keyed by name.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.NormalizeProviderName(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes provider name from "Last, First" to "First Last" format.
member.param: Provider name that may be in "Last, First" format.
member.returns: Normalized name in "First Last" format.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.ReverseNameParts(System.String)
member.summary: Reverses space-separated name parts to handle "LAST FIRST" to "FIRST LAST" conversion.
member.returns: Reversed name in "FIRST LAST" format.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.TryMatchProviderName(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to match a provider name in various formats against a HashSet.
member.returns: True if a match was found.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.TryMatchProviderInDictionary(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}@,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to match a provider name in various formats against a Dictionary.
member.param: Dictionary of providers keyed by name.
The matched provider dictionary if found.
member.returns: True if a match was found.

member.summary: Adds phone numbers from participant details to patient records.
member.param: Dictionary of patients keyed by name.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.AddPhoneNumbersFromSmsStats(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Adds phone numbers with failed meeting details to patient records from SMS stats.
member.param: Dictionary of patients keyed by name.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.AddEmailAddressesFromEmailStats(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Adds email addresses with failed meeting details to patient records from Email stats.
member.param: Dictionary of patients keyed by name.

member.summary: Adds delivery success data to phone numbers from Message Delivery Stats.
member.param: Dictionary of patients keyed by name.

member.summary: Adds delivery success data to email addresses from Message Delivery Stats.
member.param: Dictionary of patients keyed by name.

member.summary: Adds meeting information to patient records from Visit Details Participant Details.
member.param: Dictionary of patients keyed by name.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.CombineDateAndTime(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Combines date and time strings into a single formatted string.
member.returns: Combined date and time string, or null if either is missing.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.CombineNameAndVersion(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Combines name and version strings into a single formatted string.
member.returns: Combined name and version string, or null if either is missing.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.SanitizePhoneNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Sanitizes a phone number to 10-digit format (area code + local number).
member.returns: 10-digit phone number, or empty string if invalid.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.IsValidEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Validates email address format.
member.returns: True if email follows standard format.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.WriteErrorFile(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Writes error messages to a file.
member.param: Directory to write the error file.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.IsClient(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Checks if a participant record represents a client (patient).
member.returns: True if the participant is a CLIENT.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetStringValue(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Safely extracts a string value from a dictionary.
member.returns: Trimmed string value, or null if not found.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.ReadJsonFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads and deserializes a JSON file.
member.param: Name of the JSON file to read.
member.returns: Deserialized object, or empty list if file doesn't exist.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.WriteDatabaseFile(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Writes the complete database to transmorger.json.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetDatabaseStructureDiagnostic
member.summary: Diagnostic method to check database root properties.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetFirstSmsFailureDiagnostic
member.summary: Diagnostic method to show first SMS failure record if any exist.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.SearchForSmsFailureRecords
member.summary: Searches the database for SMS failure records with phone numbers.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.ListAllRootProperties
member.summary: Lists all root-level properties in the database to help identify SMS Stats location.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.AnalyzeDatabaseSizeIssues
member.summary: Analyzes database for potential data duplication to identify size issues.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetSmsFailureStats(System.String)
member.summary: Gets SMS failure records for a specific phone number by searching all patients.
member.param: The normalized 10-digit phone number to search for.
member.returns: A list of SMS failure records with Phone Number, Error Message and Scheduled Start Time.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetMessageDeliveryStats(System.String)
member.summary: Gets message delivery records for a specific phone number by searching all patients.
member.param: The normalized 10-digit phone number to search for.
member.returns: A list of message delivery records with Phone Number, Delivery Status, Message Type, Error Message, Date Sent, and Time Sent.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetEmailFailureStats(System.String)
member.summary: Gets email failure records for a specific email address by searching all patients.
member.param: The email address to search for.
member.returns: A list of email failure records with Email Address, Error Message and Scheduled Start Time.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Database.TransmorgerDatabase.GetEmailDeliveryStats(System.String)
member.summary: Gets email delivery records for a specific email address by searching all patients.
member.param: The email address to search for.
member.returns: A list of email delivery records with Email Address, Delivery Status, Message Type, Error Message, Date Sent, and Time Sent.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Help.HelpWindow
member.summary: Interaction logic for HelpWindow.xaml
HelpWindow

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.Help.HelpWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow
member.summary: Entry class for Tingen Transmorger.
member.remarks:
The MainWindow class is the entry point for the Tingen Transmorger application, and is split into multiple partial classes. Initially this was done to keep the code organized and maintainable, but over time it has become somewhat of a monster. Eventually this class should be refactored to separate classes.
The MainWindow.xaml.cs partial class is responsible for the main application flow.
member.summary: MainWindow

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.EnterAdminMode(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Handle admin mode operations.
member.remarks: Currently admin mode is focused on rebuilding the Transmorger database, but I'm leaving this the way it is for now in case we want to add more admin-related operations in the future.
member.param: The temporary directory for various operations.
The directory of the master database.
member.returns: Asynchronous task.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.RebuildDatabase(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Rebuild the Transmorger database.
member.param: The temporary directory for various operations.
The directory of the master database.
member.returns: The Transmorger database.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.RebuildDatabasePrompt
member.summary: Prompts the user to confirm if they want to rebuild the database.
member.returns: True if the user confirms, otherwise false.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetAdminModeTheme
member.summary: Set the UI theme for admin mode.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.CopyGeneralMeetingDetails
member.summary: Copy general meeting details to the clipboard.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.CopyPatientMeetingDetails
member.summary: Copy patient meeting details to the clipboard.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.CopyProviderMeetingDetails
member.summary: Copy provider meeting details to the clipboard.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.MeetingSelected
member.summary: Handles the selection changed event for the meetings DataGrid.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayGeneralDetails(TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow,System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement},System.String)
member.summary: Displays the general meeting details.
member.remarks: This is pretty dense, but it does cut down on the amount of repetitive code, and the underlying logic is fairly simple: the whatever.Text value is set to the result of the propertyName if it exists, and converted to "---" if it does not.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._currentPatientName
member.summary: Currently selected patient name.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._currentPatientId
member.summary: Currently selected patient ID.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._smsDeliveries
member.summary: Message delivery records for the current patient's phone numbers.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._emailDeliveries
member.summary: Email delivery records for the current patient's email addresses.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._smsFailures
member.summary: SMS failure records for the current patient's phone numbers.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._emailFailures
member.summary: Email failure records for the current patient's email addresses.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientDetails(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Displays patient details in the UI.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientPhoneNumber(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Displays the patient's phone numbers in the UI.
member.param: The JSON element containing the patient's details.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetPatientPhoneNumbers(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Get a list of formatted phone numbers for a patient.
member.param: The JSON representation of the patient's details.
member.returns: A list of strings representing the formatted phone numbers of the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ShowPatientPhoneNumber(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Show the patient phone number.
member.param: A list of formatted phone numbers for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetSmsStats(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets the SMS statistics for the provided phone numbers.
member.param: A list of formatted phone numbers for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayPatientEmailAddress(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Gets the patient's email addresses from the patient details and displays them in the UI.
member.param: The JSON element containing the patient's details.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetPatientEmailAddresses(System.Nullable{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Retrieves a list of email addresses associated with the specified patient details.
member.remarks: This method extracts email addresses from the provided JSON object. It only includes non-empty addresses in the returned list.
member.param: A JSON element representing the patient's details. This element is expected to contain an 'EmailAddresses' property with an array of email address objects. This parameter cannot be null.
member.returns: A list of strings containing the email addresses of the patient. The list will be empty if no email addresses are found.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetEmailStats(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets the email statistics for the provided email addresses.
member.param: A list of email addresses for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ShowPatientEmailAddress(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Shows the patient's email addresses in the UI.
member.param: A list of email addresses for the patient.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetStringProperty(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the string value of a named property on a , or if the property is absent or null.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayProviderDetails(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Displays provider details in the UI.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplayProviderMeetingResults(System.String)
member.summary: Display meeting statistics and details for the specified provider.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.UpdateSearchResults
member.summary: Modifies the search results based on the current search type and search text.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.GetSearchResults(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a list of patient/provider search results.
member.returns: The search results.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.DisplaySearchResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Display search results.
member.param: The list of search results to display.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.Display
member.summary: Display details for the selected user.
member.remarks:
A "user" in this context refers to either a patient or a provider.
When a user is selected from the search results, this method will:
Change the UserTypeKey contents to "PATIENTS" or "PROVIDERS" based on the search type
Display the user name
Display the user ID
Display the patient phone number(s), and set the detail button
Display the patient email addresses(s), and set the detail button
Display the user's meting breakdown
Display the user's meting list

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ExtractNameId(System.String)
member.summary: Extract the user name and ID.
member.param: The string containing the name and ID.
member.returns: A string array where [0] = name and [1] = ID.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetInitialUi
member.summary: Setup the initial user interface.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetAllComponents
member.summary: Reset all of the UI components.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetUserDetailUi
member.summary: Reset the user detail UI components.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetMeetingResultUi
member.summary: Reset the meeting result UI components.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetGeneralMeetingDetailUi
member.summary: Reset the general meeting detail UI components.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetPatientMeetingDetailUi
member.summary: Reset the patient meeting detail UI components.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ResetProviderMeetingDetailUi
member.summary: Reset the provider meeting details UI components.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetPatientDetailUi(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Setup the user interface for displaying patient details.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetProviderDetailUi(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Setup the user interface for displaying patient details.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetUserDetail(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update user detail UI
member.param: The context or category of the search operation, used to indicate the type of user information being displayed.
The name of the user to be shown in the user interface.
The unique identifier of the user to be presented in the user interface.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.SetSearchToggleUi
member.summary: Toggle the search type button text.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.ClearUi
member.summary: Clear user interface components.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.UpdateDetailsButtonColor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Windows.Controls.Button)
member.summary: Update the btnPhoneDetails/btnEmailDetails appearance.

member.name: F:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow._tmDb
member.summary: The Transmorger database.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.#ctor
member.summary: Entry method for Tingen Transmorger.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.StopApp(System.String)
member.summary: Stop the application.
member.remarks:
If you pass a message to , it will be displayed to the user in a MessageBox before the application exits.
This method is public because it is called from other methods outside the class.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.StartApp
member.summary: Start the application.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.MainWindow.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow
member.summary: Represents a row in the patient meetings table.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.MeetingId
member.summary: Gets or sets the meeting ID.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ScheduledStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the scheduled start time.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ActualStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual start time.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ScheduledEnd
member.summary: Gets or sets the scheduled end time.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.ActualEnd
member.summary: Gets or sets the actual end time.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Arrived
member.summary: Gets or sets the time the patient arrived.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Dropped
member.summary: Gets or sets the time the patient dropped from the meeting.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Duration
member.summary: Gets or sets the duration of the meeting.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the meeting status.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.HasError
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this meeting has an error in the MeetingError collection.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.IsCancelled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this meeting has been cancelled.

member.name: P:TingenTransmorger.Models.MeetingRow.IsCompleted
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this meeting has been completed.

member.summary: Excel data set configuration for reading Excel files.

member.summary: Processes Message Delivery Excel reports.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.summary: Processes Message Failure Excel reports.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.summary: Processes Visit Detail Excel reports.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.summary: Processes Visit Stats Excel reports.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorkbook.Process(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.Data.DataTable,System.String},System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Excel files matching a pattern and invokes a callback for each worksheet.
member.param: Directory to search for Excel files.
Callback action that receives each DataTable and sheet name.
Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.Summary(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Nullable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}}@)
member.summary: Processes summary sheets with key-value pairs, aggregating numeric values across files.
member.param: DataTable containing the summary sheet data.
Optional tuple to capture column header names.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.Keyed(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Processes sheets with a unique key column, optionally aggregating numeric values for duplicate keys.
member.param: Dictionary to store records keyed by the specified column.
List to track all column headers encountered.
Name of the column to use as the unique key.
If true, numeric values are summed for duplicate keys.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.SimpleKeyed(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Processes sheets with a unique key column, keeping only the first occurrence of each key.
member.param: Dictionary to store records keyed by the specified column.
HashSet to track all column headers encountered.
Name of the column to use as the unique key.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.ClientStats(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}}},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Processes sheets with client statistics, allowing multiple records per client.
member.param: Dictionary to store lists of records per client.
HashSet to track all column headers encountered.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ProcessWorksheet.Flat(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Processes sheets as flat record lists, capturing all rows without keying or aggregation.
member.param: HashSet to track all column headers encountered.

member.name: T:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor
member.summary: Entry class for processing TeleHealth reports.

remarks.para: Processes TeleHealth Excel reports and converts them to JSON format.

This processor handles four types of reports:
Visit Stats - Summary and Meeting Errors
Visit Details - Meeting Details and Participant Details
Message Failure - Summary, SMS Stats, and Email Stats
Message Delivery - Message Delivery Stats

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.Process(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Processes all TeleHealth reports from the import directory and generates JSON output files.
member.param: Configuration object containing import and output directory paths.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessVisitStats(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Visit Stats reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessVisitDetails(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Visit Details reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessMessageFailure(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Message Failure reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportProcessor.ProcessMessageDelivery(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Processes Message Delivery reports with progress callback support.
member.param: Optional callback to report status messages.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteSummaryJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.Nullable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Writes summary data as JSON with metric-value pairs.
member.param: Name of the JSON file to create.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteKeyedJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Writes keyed data as JSON array.
member.param: Name of the JSON file to create.
Dictionary of records keyed by unique identifier.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteClientStatsJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}}})
member.summary: Writes client statistics as JSON with nested records structure.
member.param: Name of the JSON file to create.
Dictionary of record lists keyed by client name.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteFlatJson(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Writes flat record list as JSON after de-duplication.
member.param: Name of the JSON file to create.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.WriteJson(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes data to a JSON file with formatted indentation.
member.param: Name of the JSON file to create.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.NormalizePhoneNumbersInData(System.Object)
member.summary: Recursively normalizes phone number fields in data structures before JSON serialization.
member.param: Data object that may contain phone number fields.
member.returns: The data with phone number fields normalized.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.NormalizePhoneNumbersInDictionary(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Normalizes phone number fields within a dictionary.
member.param: Dictionary that may contain phone number fields.
member.returns: A new dictionary with phone number fields normalized.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.IsPhoneNumberField(System.String)
member.summary: Determines if a field name likely contains phone number data.
member.param: Name of the field to check.
member.returns: True if the field name suggests it contains phone number data.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.LooksLikePhoneNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Determines if a string value looks like a phone number.
member.returns: True if the value appears to be a phone number.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.UpdateHeaders(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{System.String})
member.summary: Updates the headers collection with columns from the current table.
member.param: DataTable to extract column names from.
Collection to update with column names.
member.returns: HashSet containing the current table's column names.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.BuildRow(System.Data.DataTable,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Creates an empty dictionary sized for the expected number of columns.
member.param: DataTable (currently unused, reserved for future optimization).
List of column headers to determine dictionary capacity.
member.returns: Empty dictionary with pre-allocated capacity.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.MergeRows(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Merges a new row into an existing row, aggregating numeric values and preserving non-null data.
member.param: New row dictionary with values to merge.
Key column name to skip during merge.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.ParseDoubleValue(System.Object)
member.summary: Parses an object as a double value, handling various formats including quoted strings.
member.returns: Parsed double value, or 0 if parsing fails.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.TryParseDouble(System.Object,System.Double@)
member.summary: Attempts to parse an object as a double value using invariant and current culture.
member.returns: True if parsing succeeded; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.DeduplicateRecords(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}})
member.summary: Removes exact duplicate records from a list by comparing JSON serialization.
member.returns: List containing only unique records.

member.name: M:TingenTransmorger.TeleHealthReport.ReportUtility.NormalizePhoneNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a phone number to exactly 10 digits by removing non-numeric characters and the leading '1' if present.
member.param: Raw phone number string that may contain formatting characters like '+', '-', '(', ')', spaces, etc.
member.returns: A 10-digit phone number string (area code + local number) if the input can be normalized; otherwise, returns the original value if it cannot be normalized to exactly 10 digits.
member.remarks: This method ensures phone numbers are stored in JSON files with consistent formatting: - All non-numeric characters ('+', '-', '(', ')', spaces, etc.) are removed - Leading '1' is removed if the number is 11 digits (common in North American phone numbers) - Only returns the normalized value if it results in exactly 10 digits
